title: ceratostylis oreophila
intro: Ceratostylis oreophila, also known as the mountain orchid, is a type of orchid native to the Himalayas. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to treat various respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma due to its anti-inflammatory and expectorant properties. The health benefits of Ceratostylis oreophila include its potential to reduce inflammation, alleviate coughs, and ease congestion, making it a popular herbal remedy for respiratory conditions. The plant is often prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties and health benefits.
